TASK_LABELS.description: Show colour-coded labels on task cards for categorisation

NOTIFICATIONS.description: Show the notification bell in the navbar

TASK_PRIORITY.description: Allow setting low/medium/high priority on tasks and show priority badge

TASK_COMMENTS.description: Allow users to add and view threaded comments on tasks

CSV_EXPORT.description: Export task list as a downloadable CSV file

DASHBOARD_ANALYTICS.description: Show the analytics dashboard page with task completion metrics

COLLABORATION.description: Allow task owners to share tasks with other users

DARK_MODE.description: Enable dark mode toggle in the navbar

AI_SUGGESTIONS.description: Show AI-powered task suggestions based on user history
